themes.exampleQuote: The strawberry matcha here might be the best I've ever had.
I just wish this place was bigger, gets packed quickly!
We liked all the drinks we ordered though mine was definitely on the sweet side.
I asked for a blueberry muffin, received a raisin/walnut muffin, let them know, I had to pay for a new muffin.
The workers are so nice every time I visit!

notable_quote: The strawberry matcha here might be the best I've ever had — the coffee, food, and overall cafe vibe is fantastic.
sentiment_summary: Reviewers keep coming back for the strawberry matcha and tiramisu latte specifically, but the space's size, inconsistent order accuracy, and weak Wi-Fi are the recurring friction points.
quarter_narrative: Twenty-six Pittsburgh creators filmed Delanie's Coffee Shadyside this quarter, generating 176,000 plays on TikTok — and the shop posted three times on Instagram, none of it video. The tiramisu and strawberry matcha have become a minor TikTok genre in their own right, with @tessadecario alone pulling 37,200 plays off a single caption. Meanwhile, the family leader this issue, Allegheny Coffee & Tea Exchange, holds its position on social momentum — the exact axis where Delanie's has the most ground to close. The rank moves when the shop starts treating its own feed with a fraction of the urgency the city is already showing it.
tldr_read: Twenty-six creators are filming the tiramisu latte; Delanie's is posting once every two weeks and has no TikTok presence at all. Ones to Watch, #4 in Pittsburgh Coffee Shops.
tldr_meaning: The creator signal is already doing the work of a marketing department; the gap between what the city is producing and what the business is publishing is the single variable separating this rank from the next tier.

diagnosis_pullquote.line: The Tiramisu Has 176,000 TikTok Plays. The Shop Has No TikTok Account.

playbook.headline: Get on TikTok before the creators move on
playbook.action: Claim a TikTok account now — 26 creators have already written the brief; the shop just needs to show up in the same conversation.

playbook.headline: Turn Instagram Reels gap into a visual asset
playbook.action: Zero Reels posted in 30 days; one 15-second pour video of the strawberry matcha or tiramisu latte would directly address the Instagram Momentum signal sitting below the family median.

playbook.headline: Resolve the order accuracy friction publicly
playbook.action: Review sentiment sits well below the family median at 60; one pointed response to the muffin-charge complaint would signal accountability and protect the 82% five-star rate from erosion.
